meta.title: ProjentIQ — Invoice and document extraction for businesses
meta.description: We automatically extract data from your invoices and documents into your accounting system. Connects to Pohoda and Omega, data stays in the EU. We'll show you on your own invoice.

footer.tagline: AI automation for document processing, knowledge bases, and workflows — built for small and mid-sized businesses in Slovakia and Czechia.
footer.address_placeholder: Registered address: TODO — add real address
footer.ico_placeholder: Company ID: TODO — add real ID

hero.title: Software processes your documents, not your staff.
hero.lead: Upload or photograph a document and ProjentIQ pulls out the data and prepares it for your accounting system. You just review and approve it. Your data stays with you, in the EU.

rotator.item_1: Extracts amounts, tax IDs, and due dates from invoices.
rotator.item_2: Answers questions based on your internal documents.
rotator.item_3: Runs repeatable tasks based on rules you set.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.step_1_desc: A PDF, a scan, or a phone photo — upload several at once if you like.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Vendor, amounts, VAT, due date, and line items.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Flagged fields are highlighted — fix them with a click.
how_it_works.step_4_desc: Data goes into Pohoda, Omega, or your own system.

products.title: Solutions & pricing
products.card_1_desc: Invoices, receipts, and delivery notes go straight into your accounting system. You just approve them.
products.card_2_desc: Ask your documents a question and get an answer — always with a source citation.
products.card_3_desc: Email agents, approval flows, and connections to your CRM or internal systems.

why.title: Why ProjentIQ
why.item_1_desc: Processing happens in the EU, with no sharing with third parties.
why.item_2_title: Connects to Slovak and Czech systems
why.item_3_desc: Tuned for local documents, diacritics, and language.
why.item_4_desc: Before you commit, you'll see a result, not a promise.

testimonials.title: Our first deployments are underway
testimonials.coming_soon: No invented quotes — we'll fill this in once we have real deployments.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Processing happens within the EU and we don't share your documents with third parties. For sensitive setups, we can deploy directly on your own infrastructure.
faq.q2: Which accounting systems do you connect to?
faq.a2: Pohoda, Omega, iDoklad, and others via API or import. We can adapt to your own system too.
faq.a3: A first working demo on your own data usually takes up to two weeks. Full deployment depends on scope.
faq.q4: What if the system misreads a document?
faq.a4: Flagged fields are always highlighted for review, and nothing gets recorded without your approval. The system also learns from your corrections.

cta_band.title: We'll show you on your own invoice.
cta_band.lead: A free consultation and a demo on a real document from your company.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: Tell us a bit about what you're looking to automate — we'll get back to you with a time for a short demo.
contact.message_placeholder: What would you like to automate?
contact.consent_pre: I agree to the processing of data for the purpose of responding to my request.
contact.success_message: We'll get back to you within one business day.
contact.error_consent: You need to agree to data processing before sending.
contact.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us at info{'@'}projentiq.com.
